product-service/src/main/java/com/exampl.general_idea: Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by newer Spring Boot versions on Java 17.

account-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot starter parent from 2.7.17 to 3.3.2 to align with Java 17 and modern Spring ecosystem.
Update the Java version property from 11 to 17 to enforce compilation and runtime on Java 17.
Upgrade Spring Cloud version from 2021.0.2 to 2023.0.3 to ensure compatibility with Spring Boot 3.x.

Upgrade Spring Cloud version from 2021.0.2 to 2023.0.3 to be compatible with Spring Boot 3.x.
